_comment: Independent expected topology for the louke v0.12 `new_feature` workflow definition. Hand-authored from the gap-analysis §3 P1-1 contract (NOT imported from louke). The product catalog (louke.web.api._runtime_store._new_feature_definition) must produce a structurally equivalent graph; if they ever diverge, drift is detected by tests/ground_truth/test_definition_graph.py paired with tests/unit/runtime. See issue #178 (S5).
